Kobe Bryant

Kobe Bean Bryant

(Black Mamba, KB24, Vino, Showboat, Little Flying Warrior, The Eighth Man, Lord of the Rings)

Position: Shooting Guard and Small Forward ▪ Shoots: Right

6-6, 212lb (198cm, 96kg)

Born: August 23, 1978 in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania us

Died: January 26, 2020

Relatives: Father Joe Bryant; Uncle Chubby Cox

High School: Lower Merion in Ardmore, Pennsylvania

Draft: Charlotte Hornets, 1st round (13th pick, 13th overall), 1996 NBA Draft

NBA Debut: November 3, 1996

Hall of Fame: Inducted as Player in 2020 (Full List)

Career Length: 20 years

  • Hall of Fame
  • 18x All Star
  • 2x Scoring Champ
  • 5x NBA Champ
  • 15x All-NBA
  • 1996-97 All-Rookie
  • 12x All-Defensive
  • 4x AS MVP
  • 2007-08 MVP
  • 2x Finals MVP
  • NBA 75th Anniv. Team
  • 2018 Oscar
+5

POWERED BY
Kobe Bryant's 715 4th quarter points in 2005-06 are the most by any player in a single season since 1996-97. Can you name which player has the second-most?
Subscribe to Stathead, your all-access pass to the Basketball Reference database, to answer more questions like this.

Salaries

Frequently Asked Questions

Where was Kobe Bryant born?

Kobe Bryant was born in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.

When was Kobe Bryant born?

Kobe Bryant was born on August 23, 1978.

How tall was Kobe Bryant?

Kobe Bryant was 6-6 (198 cm) tall.

How much did Kobe Bryant weigh when playing?

Kobe Bryant weighed 212 lbs (96 kg) when playing.

Is Kobe Bryant in the Hall of Fame?

Kobe Bryant was inducted to the Hall of Fame as a Player in 2020 (Full List) .

When was Kobe Bryant drafted?

Kobe Bryant was drafted by Charlotte Hornets, 1st round (13th pick, 13th overall), 1996 NBA Draft.

What position did Kobe Bryant play?

Shooting Guard and Small Forward.

When did Kobe Bryant retire?

Kobe Bryant last played in 2016.

What did Kobe Bryant average?

Kobe Bryant averaged 25.0 points, 5.2 rebounds, and 4.7 assists per game.

How many rings does Kobe Bryant have?

Kobe Bryant won 5 championships.

What schools did Kobe Bryant attend?

Kobe Bryant attended Lower Merion in Ardmore, Pennsylvania.

What are Kobe Bryant's nicknames?

Black Mamba, KB24, Vino, Showboat, Little Flying Warrior, The Eighth Man, Lord of the Rings are nicknames for Kobe Bryant.

Name + "Statistics" Translations
